use_cases: Hero section typography with dramatic character-by-character blur reveal animations
Landing page headers that create immersive visual impact with staggered text animations
Brand-focused hero displays with responsive 15vw text sizing and dark mode support
Minimalist portfolio or showcase hero sections requiring smooth text transitions
ai_summary: An immersive hero text component featuring character-by-character blur reveal animations with a shutter effect. The component renders large responsive typography using viewport units, supports dark mode with smooth transitions, and includes a subtle grid background overlay. Built with Framer Motion for orchestrated staggered animations across individual characters, making it ideal for impactful hero sections on landing pages or portfolio sites.
